label: Kadomtsev interchange criterion has an entropy-gradient interpretation analogous to Schwarzschild-Ledoux

provenance.source_span: Sustained neutron production from a sheared-flow stabilized Z-pinch Y. Zhang,a) U. Shumlak, B. A. Nelson, R. P. Golingo, T. R. Weber, A. D. Stepanov, E. L. Claveau, E. G. Forbes, and Z.

strengths: Connects interchange criteria to an entropy-gradient interpretation that may clarify mode families.
weaknesses: The analogy may not transfer cleanly to helical flow with H3 without further derivation.
